T001.description: Capture baseline npm audit, test coverage, and webhook-latency bench results
T001.result_summary: Captured baseline: 23 audit vulns, 20/20 suites pass, 94.43% stmt coverage, saved to baseline.md

T002.description: Update @nestjs/core, common, platform-express, testing to ^11.1.27 in package.json

T005.description: Run npm install to regenerate package-lock.json
T005.result_summary: npm install succeeded, lockfile regenerated; residual: multer@2.1.1 pinned by platform-express@11.1.27 still has 2 high-sev DoS advisories (fix needs multer 2.2.0, not yet adopted upstream); app has no file-upload routes so unreachable

T006.description: Run build and test, diagnose and fix v10 to v11 breaking-change fallout
T006.result_summary: Build succeeded, no code changes needed for v10->v11 migration. Full suite green in 3/3 reruns (20/20 suites, 36/36 tests); one isolated flaky failure observed (different status code each time: 501 then 503) consistent with pre-existing test-infra timing flakiness, not a version-specific regression

T007.description: Run npm audit and confirm zero findings for nestjs packages
T007.result_summary: npm audit: zero findings for @nestjs/core, @nestjs/config, @nestjs/cli (down from 23 to 4). Residual: multer@2.1.1 pinned by platform-express, unreachable (no upload routes)

T008.description: Re-run npm run build standalone and confirm no errors
T008.result_summary: npm run build succeeds standalone with no errors

T009.description: Run npm test and test:cov, confirm no coverage regression
T009.result_summary: 20/20 suites, 36/36 tests pass; coverage identical to baseline (94.43% stmts); no regression

T010.description: Run npm run start:dev and confirm clean startup
T010.result_summary: Dev server starts cleanly on Express v5/NestJS v11, all modules init, routes map correctly, webhook verify GET returns 200. (Required recreating a locally-vanished Postgres container to test this, unrelated to the upgrade)

T011.description: Run npm run build and start:prod and confirm clean startup
T011.result_summary: npm run build + node dist/main.js starts cleanly, all modules init, routes mapped, no errors/warnings

T012.description: Perform manual smoke test of core WhatsApp bot flows in non-production
T012.result_summary: Real HTTP smoke test against compiled prod build: signature verification, unauthorized-sender rejection, and authorized-sender extraction path all behave correctly; unhandled downstream error (fake OpenAI key) correctly caught by default exception filter as 500, process survived. Limitation: used placeholder OpenAI/WhatsApp credentials, not real ones - full E2E with real WhatsApp Business API needs human verification in staging before prod deploy

T013.description: Write migration notes documenting v10 to v11 breaking-change adjustments
T013.result_summary: Wrote migration-notes.md documenting dependency changes, zero code changes needed, verification results, residual multer finding, and pre-existing flake observation

T014.description: Run npm run lint and npm run format, confirm zero new warnings
T014.result_summary: lint: 0 warnings. format check: 9 pre-existing files flagged, confirmed unrelated to this change (prettier's resolved version 3.9.4 unchanged by the upgrade, and none of the 9 files were touched here) - out of scope to fix

T015.description: Open PR and obtain human review for constitution compliance
